summary: Classified the live PR inventory shard as independent open PRs. No shared canonical was invented, no security-sensitive refs were detected, instant close and low-signal closeout are disabled, and merge/fix/raise-pr actions are blocked by the job. All listed PRs should remain open for their normal per-PR maintainer/author review path.
